title: Origins: Spore Springer
description: An origin that loves bouncing on its balls.
body:
# 🍄 Spore Springer **(Impact 3 Origin)** *Humanoid fungus with a passion for jumping on cosmic spore clouds.* ## • Powerlist •
😶‍🌫️ Springy Spores: Primary Ability You can produce a cloud of cosmic-infused spores. They will shoot everything nearby away, even allowing you to jump on them.
Info Delete Spore Clouds with [USE]. Any player can do this, not just Spore Springers.
💨 Spore Shot: Secondary Ability Gather your spores and shoot them, knocking back enemies or causing Spore Clouds to pulse.
Spore Cloud Pulse: Throws entities away from the cloud, and throws Spore Springers farther.
🪶 Floaty You float instead of falling, unless sneaking. This makes you immune to impact and fall damage.
🕊️ Aerial Spores Your speed is greatly increased while in the air. Your mining speed is the same in the air as it is on land.
Info Your spores allow you to naturally jump higher, and up to 2 blocks when sneaking.
🍄 Viridian You awake in your homeland; the Warped Forest.
❤️ Resting Place Your body siphons the essence of your Spore Clouds while in the Nether, causing you to heal faster while around them, and not on fire.
⬇️ Gravitational Curse You are saddened when you are restricted to the ground, resulting in a lower resistance for damage.
😵‍💫 Vertigo The ground pulls your spores, making you walk slower while on it.
🔥 Magmatic Decay Your spores have a hypersensitivity to lava, causing them to be greatly harmed by it. Spore Cloud Pulses will extinguish you.
## • Additional • This origin is a remake and reflavor of Nebula by somnia✦, who permitted me to remake and reflavor this origin!
